name: ccplugins
description: Custom Claude Code plugins by prefrontalsys

plugins.name: holden
plugins.description: Holden personality system — soul, constitution, epistemic hooks, and all agent definitions. Supersedes individual agent plugins.

plugins.name: thinking-partner
plugins.description: Always-on thinking partner output style with Insight blocks and Notable blocks. Merges exploratory dialogue stance with educational code insights.

plugins.name: vault-aware-style
plugins.description: Vault-aware output style: educational insights + automatic vault orchestration (finalize, memorize, recall, skill dispatch)

plugins.name: prose-style
plugins.description: Prose-first output style: longform writing, interlocutor mode, paragraph-first output, casual-authoritative voice (Ars Technica + Aeon).
